name: Smartly Visa Signature Card

verdict.text: Keep if you bank with U.S. Bank Smartly for a real deposit balance

earn_note: The uncapped 2% base is genuinely competitive on its own, but the card's real pitch is the Smartly Earning Bonus: pair it with a U.S. Bank Smartly Savings account plus a qualifying Smartly Checking/Safe Debit balance and earn up to 4% on your first $10,000 in net purchases each billing cycle: 2.5% at $10k–$49,999, 3% at $50k–$99,999, 4% at $100k+. Purchases over $10k/cycle, and categories like gift cards, tax, and education, fall back to the plain 2% base.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a U.S. Bank checking or savings account
Statement credit, rewards card, or merchant gift cards

points.note: The advertised cash-back rates only apply when redeemed as a deposit into an eligible U.S. Bank account. Other redemption paths (statement credit, gift cards) may pay out at a reduced rate. Points expire after 12 consecutive statement cycles with no reward, purchase, or balance activity.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency: straight cash back, not a points program.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for unauthorized transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: U.S. Bank's marketing for this card doesn't publish a purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide the way it does for Shield. Unlike Amex/Chase premium cards, don't assume Visa Signature-standard purchase protections apply without checking your actual Guide to Benefits after approval.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card as of this writing.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers for the first 12 billing cycles, then 18.24%–28.24% variable.

services.name: U.S. Bank ExtendPay Plan
services.detail: Pay off up to 50% of your credit line in fixed installments with a $0 fee offer for plans opened in the first 60 days.

services.name: Cash-back deals
services.detail: Personalized merchant offers in the U.S. Bank Mobile App based on past spending, stacked on top of the base earn rate.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns the same 2% base on their spend
Their deposit balances don't count toward your Smartly Earning Bonus tier

additional_cards.note: Free to add, but the Smartly Earning Bonus tier is based only on the primary cardholder's (or, for joint accounts, whichever cardholder has the higher) qualifying balance.
